findStrings.find: 获取会员饭卡信息结果

expression.expression-string: List<ShopCardDiscountViewVO.ShopCardVO> generalCardVOList = shopCardList.stream() .filter(item -> !existDiscountPriceCardIds.contains(item.getId()) && (StringUtils.equals(item.getShopId(), "0") || orderShopIds.stream().allMatch(shopId -> item.getShopId() != null && item.getShopId().contains(shopId.toString())))) .map(item -> ShopCardDiscountViewVO.ShopCardVO.builder() .receiveId(item.getReceiveId()) .shopCardId(item.getId()) .cardNo(item.getCardNo()) .cardName(item.getCardName()) .type(0) .balance(BigDecimalUtil.getBigDecimal_2(item.getBalance())) .build()) .collect(Collectors.toList());
